title: rhipsalis alternata
intro: Rhipsalis alternata, also known as the 'Alternate Chain Cactus' or 'Chain Plant', is a type of epiphytic cactus native to Brazil and Argentina. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rhipsalis alternata include its potential to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Rhipsalis alternata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
